hifi_reads.description: Array paths of the unaligned bam file

phenotypes.description: Array of phenotypes HPO types like HP:0001999

ref_map_file.description: Refmap tsv file included all s3 paths of reference ex: s3://<bucket_path>/GRCh38.ref_map.v2p0p0.aws.tsv

tertiary_map_file.description: Annotation tsv file included all s3 paths of tertiary analysis ex: ss3://<bucket_path>/GRCh38.tertiary_map.v2p0p0.aws.tsv

gpu.description: Use of GPUs true or false, default: false
